title: TCWP Training Example (JSONL line)
description: Distilled supervised fine-tuning view. Each record is a complete (task, context, target behavior, validated outcome) tuple for vertical model training.

task.description: Natural language task description the model should learn to execute

input_context_ref.description: Reference to context snapshot (state_snapshots.jsonl#ID or events.jsonl#range)

input_context_inline.description: Inline context snapshot (for self-contained export). Use ref OR inline, not both.

available_tools.description: Tool names available to the model during this task

system_prompt_ref.description: Reference to the system prompt used (for prompt-faithful distillation)

intermediate_plan.description: Expected reasoning/planning trace before action (chain-of-thought target)

critical_steps.description: Ordered list of essential actions the model must take

optional_steps.description: Steps that are acceptable but not required

prohibited_steps.description: Steps the model must never take (safety/correctness)

compressed_action_sequence.description: Concrete tool call sequence (for behavior cloning)

validated_outcome_ref.description: Reference to eval that validated this outcome (evals.jsonl#ID)

quality.description: Quality tier: gold=human-verified, silver=machine-verified, bronze=heuristic, synthetic=generated

domain_tags.description: Vertical/domain tags (kyb_aml, ehr_ops, mobile_qa, legacy_portal, etc.)

difficulty.description: Estimated task difficulty for curriculum design

token_budget.description: Expected token budget for this task (for efficiency-aware training)
